abilities.name: Icon Of Grimnir
abilities.flavor: The Battlesmith raises his icon of Grimnir, inspiring his allies so that they fight until the bitter end.
abilities.effect: Add 1 to save rolls for friendly units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.

abilities.name: Plant The Icon
abilities.flavor: The Battlesmith slams the pommel of his icon into the earth, setting the urgold runes of nearby allies ablaze.
abilities.effect: For the rest of the turn, friendly units have WARD ( 5+ ) while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.

abilities.name: Icon Of Grimnir

abilities.name: Duty Unto Death
abilities.flavor: Hearthguard Berzerkers are sworn to protect their lodge and its masters until their dying breath.
abilities.effect: While your general is wholly within this unit’s combat range , both this unit and your general have WARD ( 5+ ) .

abilities.name: Duty Unto Death
abilities.flavor: Hearthguard Berzerkers are sworn to protect their lodge and its masters until their dying breath.
abilities.effect: While your general is wholly within this unit’s combat range , both this unit and your general have WARD ( 5+ ) .

abilities.name: Whirlwind Of Destruction
abilities.flavor: With the light of Grimnir burning in their eyes, these impetuous warriors hurl themselves into the fray.
abilities.effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s melee weapons if it charged in the same turn.

battleTraits.name: Awaken The Runes
battleTraits.summary: On a 1-5, the rune’s standard effect applies
battleTraits.declare: Pick 1 of the ur-gold runes from the ur-gold runes table, then make an activation roll of D6. Each urgold rune can only be activated once per battle.
battleTraits.effect: On a 1-5, the rune’s standard effect applies. On a 6, the rune’s enhanced effect applies as well. The effects last until the start of your next turn.
